phases.objective: Thread reply forwarding + forwarded message indicator
phases.user_visible_gain: Users can forward thread replies and see forwarded-from indicators in target conversations
phases.before_after: Thread replies cannot be forwarded; no forwarded-from indicator exists
phases.local_validation: 27 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds

phases.objective: Image/video upload flow progress, error recovery, success confirmation
phases.scope: AssetWorkspace, ImageWorkspace, VideoWorkspace, upload API, asset management
phases.user_visible_gain: Upload progress bars, retry on failure, clear success confirmation, file size validation
phases.before_after: Uploads show minimal feedback; no progress, no retry, no success state
phases.local_validation: 27 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Replaced fetch-based upload with XHR for progress tracking; added file validation, cancel, and success summary

phases.objective: Upload area and asset workspace visual polish
phases.scope: AssetWorkspace, ImageWorkspace, VideoWorkspace, upload zones, asset cards, empty states
phases.user_visible_gain: Upload zones look more polished, asset cards more consistent, empty states clearer
phases.before_after: Upload area feels raw; asset cards inconsistent; empty states generic
phases.local_validation: 27 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Polished upload box hover/drag/uploading states, asset card metadata spacing, empty state sizing, dark mode support

phases.objective: Move bookmarks and pins to D1-backed persistence
phases.scope: useMessageBookmarking, useMessagePinning, API, D1 schema, server functions
phases.user_visible_gain: Bookmarks and pins persist across devices and browsers
phases.before_after: Bookmarks and pins are localStorage-only; lost on device switch
phases.local_validation: 27 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Added D1 schema, server endpoints, and client hooks for bookmarks and pins. Fixed import path issue in CI.

phases.scope: Entire codebase, CI pipeline, build, tests, security, edge cases
phases.user_visible_gain: Stable, reliable project with known issues fixed
phases.before_after: Potential hidden issues in edge cases, security, or CI
phases.local_validation: 27 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Fixed race condition with UNIQUE constraints, added UUID validation for URL params, improved error codes (409 for duplicates)

phases.scope: ExportModal, export formats, export preview, conversation selection
phases.user_visible_gain: Better export options, preview before export, selective message export
phases.before_after: Export is basic; no preview, limited format options
phases.local_validation: 27 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Added plain text export format with Clipboard icon, updated format descriptions

phases.objective: Move message reactions and edits to D1-backed persistence
phases.scope: useMessageReactions, useMessageEditing, API, D1 schema, server functions
phases.user_visible_gain: Reactions and edit history persist across devices
phases.before_after: Reactions and edits are localStorage-only; lost on device switch
phases.local_validation: 27 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Added D1 schema, server endpoints, and client hooks for reactions and edits. Fixed import path issue.

phases.scope: useKeyboardShortcuts, keyboard help UI, shortcut categories, search
phases.user_visible_gain: Discoverable keyboard shortcuts, searchable help, category organization
phases.before_after: Keyboard shortcuts exist but help panel is basic
phases.local_validation: 27 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Added category headers, search/filter input, and improved visual hierarchy for keyboard shortcuts panel

phases.scope: All workspaces, sidebar, modals, touch targets, mobile navigation
phases.user_visible_gain: Better mobile touch targets, modal sizes, navigation rhythm
phases.before_after: Mobile has some touch target and spacing issues

phases.scope: useConversationArchiving, archive filter, bulk archive, archive stats
phases.user_visible_gain: Better archive management, archive statistics, bulk operations
phases.before_after: Archiving is basic; no stats, limited bulk operations

phases.scope: API validation, XSS, CSRF, input sanitization, error handling
phases.user_visible_gain: More secure application with better error handling
phases.before_after: Potential security gaps in API validation and input handling

phases.scope: Bundle size, lazy loading, code splitting, render optimization
phases.before_after: Bundle may be larger than necessary; some components not lazy loaded

phases.scope: useConversationMerging, merge preview, selective merge, merge history
phases.user_visible_gain: Better merge preview, selective message merge, merge undo
phases.before_after: Merge is basic; no preview, no selective merge

phases.scope: useMessageSearch, search within threads, search filters, search history
phases.user_visible_gain: Thread search, search filters, search result highlighting
phases.before_after: Search is basic; no thread search, limited filters

phases.objective: Empty states and loading states polish
phases.scope: All workspaces, EmptyState component, loading indicators, skeleton screens
phases.user_visible_gain: Beautiful empty states, smooth loading transitions, skeleton screens
phases.before_after: Empty states are generic; loading states are basic spinners

phases.scope: ThreadCenter, MessageThread, thread search, thread actions
phases.user_visible_gain: Thread search, thread actions, thread collapse all
phases.before_after: Thread management is basic; limited actions and search

phases.scope: Entire codebase, dead code, unused imports, type safety, test coverage
phases.before_after: Potential dead code, unused imports, type gaps

phases.scope: Overall polish, consistency, edge cases, final improvements
